model_hints.description: Host-agnostic model preferences. Sub-agent keys (planner/implementer/reviewer/adversary) hint at the model for sub-agents the loop dispatches; stages.* hints at the model the host should use to run each stage skill itself when driving via resume-run from external scheduling. Values are short class names ('haiku', 'sonnet', 'opus') that the host translates to concrete model IDs.

stages.description: Per-stage model hints. Defaults (when the key is absent): intake -> haiku (mechanical classification + spec extraction), ci-watching -> haiku (mechanical polling loop; fix sub-agents it dispatches still get implementer-level models). All other stages default to the host's session model — they involve real reasoning (planning, executing, finishing, pr-reviewing).

bot_author_allowlist.description: Additional comment-author logins (besides GitHub's [bot]-suffix and authorAssociation==BOT) that ticket-adapter should treat as bot comments for resume-detection purposes. Used to exempt service accounts (Slack mirrors, release bots, etc.) from triggering spurious resume signals.
